dropped.reason: too short to carry a claim

meta.model: Gemini gemini-flash-lite-latest · US (and trains on free-tier prompts)

clusters.label: Payment processing errors and unexpected charges
Account login failures and credential rejection
Purchased tickets missing from app storage or wallet
App redesign creates severe lag and navigation confusion
Constant server errors and unexpected app crashes
Unfair purchase restrictions near departure time
Language settings ignored and incorrect localizations
Incorrect train tracking and misleading schedule data

insights.title: Credential updates made on external channels fail to synchronize with the mobile application backend.
insights.summary: Customers attempting to log into the application find their credentials rejected despite successfully accessing the official website with the exact same details. Resetting passwords via web portals or recovery flows frequently results in persistent authentication errors exclusively within the mobile client. Users report being trapped in infinite loops of forced password changes that subsequently fail validation. This points to a severe synchronization gap between central user databases and mobile authentication tokens.

evidence.name: JW
evidence.quote: I set up my account on the website, and using the credentials on the app does not work. Tried resetting multiple times. Useless.

evidence.name: GL
evidence.quote: Used to love this app. Now I can’t log in. I do not use a VPN, have used both cellular and Wi-Fi, and reset my password MANY times. I can log into the website without issue, but…

evidence.name: JP
evidence.quote: the app automatically signed me out and each time I sign in it says the login credentials are wrong.( even after i clearly insert them). also when I changed my password and tried…

insights.recommendation: Audit and fix backend session token propagation so that credentials updated on web channels are immediately accepted by the mobile client without triggering forced reset loops.

insights.title: Payment systems report transaction failure on the interface while successfully debiting user accounts.
insights.summary: Users repeatedly experience a scenario where alternative payment methods and standard cards trigger an on-screen error message indicating that checkout has failed. Despite this interface rejection, the underlying bank or mobile payment provider confirms that funds have been deducted from the user. Because the application fails to generate a ticket or booking reference during these events, travelers are left stranded without proof of purchase and forced to buy tickets again or risk penalties. The disconnect between gateway responses and app state handling breaks core commerce reliability.

evidence.name: MX
evidence.quote: Ho acquistato un biglietto, i soldi sono stati sottratti dal mio conto ma senza biglietto. Ancora devo ricevere il rimborso

evidence.name: RJ
evidence.quote: update 18th May 2026. still The same. I paid and I don't get the ticket. The new app has alot of bugs. the tickets don't update, even after the payment has been deducted it…

evidence.name: PE
evidence.quote: App non più affidabile. 8 volte su 10 genera l'addebito del biglietto (salvo successivo riaccreditamento) ma non il biglietto. Lo sanno bene i controllori, sempre comprensivi a…

insights.recommendation: Implement idempotent transaction handling and an automatic verification state machine that checks pending charges against backend issuance before displaying failure screens.

insights.title: Valid tickets stored locally vanish or crash the interface when users open travel management sections.
insights.summary: Travelers relying on the application to display active bookings find that their saved trips or multi-ride carnets disappear entirely from the profile interface. Attempting to access the journeys section or manually retrieve tickets via confirmation codes frequently triggers application crashes or infinite loading loops. When passengers cannot pull up their digital tickets during onboard inspections, they face severe friction and potential disputes with staff. The instability of local cache synchronization directly threatens ticket presentation.

evidence.name: RA
evidence.quote: Puntualmente cerco du prenotare dei biglietti sul portale. Ogni volta il biglietto scompare dai miei biglietti salvati. Provo anche con il codice di recupero ma non riesce a…

evidence.name: LP
evidence.quote: Pessima. Ha fatto un aggiornamento e da mio profilo è sparito il carnet con cinque viaggi da riscuotere e non me ne fa comprare di nuovi. assistenza via chat improponibile.…

evidence.name: FB
evidence.quote: Applicazione imbarazzante, peggiora anziché migliorare, legnosissima nei pagamenti per l'acquisto dei biglietti e poi se riesci ad acquistarli non li associa nei miei viaggi...…

insights.recommendation: Isolate the ticket rendering view from main network calls with a robust local fallback cache to ensure offline accessibility of valid purchases.
